purpose: Force model-market intelligence heartbeats to produce usable routing artifacts, validated price/capability matrices, and eval-backed model roles instead of unbounded model commentary.
selection_rule: Operators must consume the highest-priority ready ticket allowed by gates.md. If live provider access is blocked, produce a precise repair/scope note and keep generated routes marked bootstrap-only.
definition_of_done: A done ticket must create or validate a raw snapshot, normalized matrix, router config, eval task, eval result, or material routing change. Status/report updates alone are not done.

tickets.mission: Initialize the repo with an OpenRouter model catalog pipeline, routing schema, seed model matrix, and board-first operations protocol.
tickets.required_connector: GitHub for writes; OpenRouter public metadata for source model fields
acceptance_tests: bootstrap script runs without network using seed data
generated CSV has required columns and no duplicate model_id rows
router config groups models by use case and role
board and value ledger are initialized for later scheduled heartbeats
tickets.supervisor_gate: Next live snapshot ticket should remain ready; production routing remains advisory until live top-weekly snapshot and local eval harness exist.
tickets.kill_condition: If OpenRouter metadata shape cannot be parsed, block live snapshot ticket and create parser repair ticket.

tickets.mission: Fetch a live OpenRouter snapshot, store raw provider metadata, and rebuild generated model outputs from live data.
acceptance_tests: stores raw models snapshot without hand edits
rebuilds generated matrix from raw snapshot
tickets.supervisor_gate: Top-50 routing claims require live snapshot or explicit bootstrap-only label.
tickets.kill_condition: Block if OpenRouter API shape changes and generated matrix validation fails.

tickets.mission: Classify the top 50 live OpenRouter text models by price, capability, context, popularity, and use-case routing role.
acceptance_tests: ranks at least 50 models when live data contains at least 50 text models
separates metadata-only claims from eval-backed claims
tickets.supervisor_gate: Requires live snapshot ticket done in the same or prior run.
tickets.kill_condition: Block if fewer than 50 eligible text models exist in current snapshot or validation fails.

tickets.mission: Add a small repo-local eval harness so model roles can be promoted from metadata-backed to eval-backed.
acceptance_tests: defines scoring fields for pass/fail, tests, cost, latency, and human quality
supports later model-by-model runs without changing prompt fixtures
tickets.supervisor_gate: No model should be labeled eval-backed until at least one eval run exists.
tickets.kill_condition: Block if eval fixtures are generic or cannot falsify model quality claims.
